featureExtractors.note: Reads pack route, ticket, and atom state as the baseline theorem-search context.
Uses the canonical theorem-loop as the current claim-surface ledger.
Exposes number-theory specific finite-gap and verifier-facing metadata.

claimGenerators.note: Promotes active routes, ready atoms, and next-honest-move records into candidate claims.
Turns theorem agenda items into explicit candidate claim tickets.

claimFalsifiers.note: Rejects claims that overstate the current theorem-loop claim surface.
Rejects claims unsupported by canonical artifacts already present in the pack.
Uses bounded exact interval checks to kill false local claims quickly.

verifierAdapters.note: Reads theorem-loop, route, and pack artifacts as verifier-facing evidence.
Bounded exact verifier for finite interval certification.
